rules.condition: cargo is DG and UN/NA identification number is missing
rules.message: Dangerous goods require a valid identification number before sea booking.

rules.condition: proper shipping name missing, ambiguous, or parser flags column shift
rules.message: DG declaration cannot be trusted until proper shipping name is clean text.

rules.condition: planned stowage conflicts with category A/B/C/D/E/01-05 restrictions
rules.message: Vessel stowage location must match authorized stowage category.

rules.condition: provision codes exist and have not been reviewed
rules.message: Column 10B stowage/handling provisions must be checked before booking.

rules.condition: multiple DG cargoes in same CTU/vessel plan without segregation compatibility check
rules.message: DG segregation/compatibility review is required; SEA-A does not replace IMDG specialist approval.

rules.condition: regulatory stowage appears acceptable but carrier/terminal DG approval not confirmed
rules.message: Legal stowage does not guarantee carrier or terminal acceptance.
